title: Moochile Theeyumaai Lyrics Baahubali (Tamil)
stanzas:
kuraiyeraa maatchiyodu
karaiyuraadha magizhmadhi.
thiraiveezhaa aatchiyodu
varaiyilaa em magizhmadhi

thannirt uyitra thulikalin
arane ena potruvaai
edhirkkum padharkalai
udhirthu maaithidum
asurane ena saatruvaai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Moochile Theeyumaai?

The song conveys themes of longing and devotion, reflecting deep emotional connections.

How does this song fit into the plot of Baahubali?

It enhances the emotional depth of the characters, showcasing their inner struggles and aspirations.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the talented Kailash Kher.

Who composed the music for Moochile Theeyumaai?

The music was composed by MM Keeravani, known for his impactful scores.

When was Moochile Theeyumaai released?

The song was released on July 10, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Moochile Theeyumaai, the listener is taken on a soulful journey that resonates with themes of devotion and longing. The song beautifully encapsulates the emotional struggles faced by the characters in Baahubali, enhancing the narrative's depth. With Kailash Kher's evocative vocals and MM Keeravani's masterful composition, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and reflection. This melody serves as a poignant reminder of love and sacrifice, making it a memorable piece in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Moochile Theeyumaai from Baahubali is a mesmerizing blend of Kailash Kher's soulful voice and MM Keeravani's enchanting composition. This song captures the essence of devotion and longing, making it a perfect listen for reflective moments. Experience the magic of this unique collaboration that transcends time and emotion.
stanzaMeanings: The fire in the mustache has come to the heart, and the eyes that have gone away are still alive.
The truth is shown only when the sight is clear, and the evidence is presented.
The country rises up with life.
My happiness is the essence of that, crying out loud.
The world of justice is here, it will resonate in the heart.
Without any flaws, happiness is not to be found. Our happiness is not limited by any rules.
You will be praised for the strength of the roots that rise from the ground, and you will defeat the demons that rise against you.
You will find the path that leads to victory over the obstacles in your way.
May the sun and the moon shine upon you, and may you live in glory.
